title: Section 27
content: 1 [27. Staff of Special Director (Appeal).--(1) The Central Government shall provide the office of the Special Director (Appeals) with such officers and employees as it may deem fit. (2) The officers and employees of the office of the Special Director (Appeals) shall discharge their functions under the general superintendence of the Special Director (Appeals). (3) The salaries and allowances and other terms and conditions of service of the officers and employees of the office of the Special Director (Appeals) shall be such as may be prescribed.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 165, ibid., for section 27 (w.e.f. 26-5-2017).
